description: Olympic champion Alysa Liu shared a powerful on-stage moment with Taylor Swift at the iHeartRadio Music Awards, presenting her with Artist of the Year. Liu’s heartfelt tribute, calling Swift the “G.O.A.T. of music,” sparked emotional fan reactions. The crossover highlighted their shared journeys of independence, resilience, and redefining success on their own terms.

Candace Owens accuses Erika Kirk of plotting Charlie Kirk’s murder
description: Candace Owens has accused Erika of plotting her husband’s murder, alleging she tried to shape public perception in advance. Owens pointed to an Instagram post from September 8, where Erika shared a video of her frail mother, claiming it was meant to gain sympathy and build a narrative. The claims remain unverified and have sparked intense online debate.

Kaif emphasized that a fitter Rohit should be involved in all game phases.

'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' BO day 9: Ranveer Singh starrer inches closer to netting Rs. 700 crore
description: Aditya Dhar’s espionage epic, 'Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge', shows no signs of slowing down as it enters its high-stakes second weekend. Starring Ranveer Singh as the covert spy Hamza, the film has officially joined the elite Rs. 1,000 crore global club in just nine days, matching the record-shattering pace of Allu Arjun starrer 'Pushpa 2.' The sequel is now poised to surpass the Rs. 894.49 crore lifetime record set by the original 2025 released 'Dhurandhar.'

title: 'Major disaster': Speeding trailer rams car in Bengaluru, man burnt alive in blaze
description: A tragic accident near Kurubarahalli saw a speeding trailer truck, allegedly on a restricted route, collide with a parked MUV, igniting a devastating blaze. The inferno claimed the life of 23-year-old Ambadas, a cab driver, trapped inside his vehicle.

title: Fact Check: Was Clavicular Arrested for Viral Alligator Shooting Video
description: Kick streamer Braden “Clavicular” Peters went viral after a clip showed him allegedly shooting an alligator in Florida’s Everglades. The video sparked outrage and rumors of his arrest. However, no official confirmation links any arrest to the incident. Authorities are investigating, while reports suggest any detention may be unrelated, leaving key details unclear.

title: Top executives of two biggest US companies are leaving and they say the reason is AI
description: Two prominent CEOs, from Coca-Cola and Walmart, have cited the rise of AI as a factor in their decisions to step down. Both leaders indicated that the evolving business landscape, driven by AI, necessitates new leadership for future growth phases. Their departures highlight a significant technological shift impacting executive decision-making at major corporations.

title: NFL Trade rumor: Chargers linked to $90 m Dolphins star to boost Justin Herbert offense
description: Tyreek Hill trade talk picked up again as the Los Angeles Chargers are reportedly targeting Miami Dolphins playmaker Tyreek Hill, a $90M talent, to address their offensive struggles. A viral post suggested that Hill could join the Chargers or Chiefs after the NFL Draft. Money also plays a role. Hill may not command the full value after the injury. That makes this a smart gamble for Los Angeles. If the Chargers pull this off after the draft, it solves their biggest issue. It adds speed, forces defences to back off, and finally gives Herbert the weapon he has been missing.

title: Quote of the day by Agatha Christie: “As life goes on it becomes tiring to keep up...”
description: Agatha Christie, the celebrated 'Queen of Crime', explored human nature deeply. Her autobiography reveals profound insights into identity. A quote from her work suggests that as life unfolds, people tire of maintaining invented characters. They eventually return to their true selves, finding liberation in authenticity. This journey of self-discovery is a key theme.

title: Magic Johnson opens up on living with HIV years after diagnosis
description: Magic Johnson recently revisited his journey living with HIV during a conference in Atlanta, offering a candid reflection shaped by decades of experience. From his shocking 1991 retirement to becoming a global advocate, Johnson turned fear into purpose. Supported by his wife Cookie and guided by medical progress, he continues to inspire through honesty, education, and resilience, proving his impact extends far beyond basketball.

title: MLB Rumors: Detroit Tigers' $140 m call as Kevin McGonigle rises
description: Detroit's decision to place Kevin McGonigle on the Opening Day roster has created a roster crunch, pushing Javier Báez into an uncertain role.  With his substantial contract, trade talks are intensifying. A potential deal with Miami could see Báez move for prospects, offering Detroit payroll relief and a clearer path for younger talent.

title: Mark Zuckerberg's Meta is rebranding employee titles and roles as it goes AI-native
description: Meta's Reality Labs is undergoing a significant internal overhaul, rebranding employees as 'AI builders' and forming smaller, AI-focused teams. This strategic shift aims to boost engineering productivity and product quality, with CEO Mark Zuckerberg envisioning AI dramatically transforming work.  These new 'AI pods' will foster cross-functional collaboration, with dedicated leads managing operations and performance.
